name: medical billing managers at small clinics processing 5–15 claims/month tool
description: For medical billing managers at small clinics processing 5–15 claims/month, manual submission errors cause delayed reimbursements. We automate the conversion of medical billing codes into insurance claim submissions instead of manual claim submission processes.
target_audience: medical billing managers at small clinics processing 5–15 claims/month
problem_solved: Manual submission of insurance claims leads to errors and delays.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual submission of insurance claims leads to errors and delays.
